channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped mattress on pavement, 22nd April
item.description:
Dumped mattress on pavement, not sure if the owner of house has dumped it, been problems there before. Doesn’t look good

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elsa Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Carpets dumped outside bin doors, 22nd April
item.description:
There is large rubbish constantly dumped outside our bins and next to the recycling bin

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped vehicle - Van, 22nd April
item.description:
The Mount car park has a dumped white transit van in our car park by the garages. Iat 13:45 there it was - smashed in front and blown tire. Unfortunately it has a Polish number plate. Please see number plate - DKG-590571

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Broomfield Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish Bins, 22nd April
item.description:
There are a large number of private rubbish bins on the pavement opposite our house which are often overfilled causes foxes to scatter rubbish everywhere including dirty nappies etc! I’m worried this will attract rodents plus it looks horrible!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Martin Dene, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lampost knocked over o/s 45 Wordsworth Rd, Welling, 22nd April
item.description:
Lampost knocked over o/s 45 Wordsworth Rd, Welling - lady from SELCO in Crayford to report that one of their drivers have completely knocked over the lampost and this is now laying on the pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In line with side car entrance to Garfiled Court in Coverdale Rd, 22nd April
item.description:
I reported this pothole more than a month ago under Ref 9179829 (photo already supplied) but it still has not been inspected. Please could an inspection be arranged as soon as possible Many thanks
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Coverdale Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parked on dropped kerb blocking pavement, 22nd April
item.description:
